name: Coca-Cola Consolidated, Inc.
summary: Coca-Cola Consolidated, Inc. is the largest Coca-Cola bottler in the United States, distributing, marketing, and manufacturing nonalcoholic beverages across 14 states and the District of Columbia, serving approximately 60 million consumers. Approximately 85% of bottle/can sales volume consists of The Coca-Cola Company products, including Coca-Cola, Sprite, and Dasani. The company also distributes Monster Energy and Dr Pepper products, offering sparkling and still beverages in bottle/can and post-mix formats.

products.name: Coca-Cola (and variants)
products.description: Principal sparkling carbonated beverage distributed and manufactured under The Coca-Cola Company agreements.

products.name: Sprite / Sprite Zero Sugar
products.description: Sparkling beverage products of The Coca-Cola Company distributed by the Company.

products.name: Dasani
products.description: Bottled water still beverage product of The Coca-Cola Company.

products.name: fairlife
products.description: Still beverage product of The Coca-Cola Company distributed by the Company.

products.name: BODYARMOR
products.description: Still beverage (sports drink) product of The Coca-Cola Company distributed by the Company.

products.name: Monster Energy
products.description: Energy drink distributed under agreement with Monster Energy Company.

products.name: Dr Pepper (and variants)
products.description: Sparkling beverage distributed and certain brands manufactured under agreement with Keurig Dr Pepper Inc.

products.name: Gold Peak
products.description: Ready-to-drink tea still beverage product of The Coca-Cola Company.

products.name: Topo Chico
products.description: Sparkling water beverage product of The Coca-Cola Company.

products.name: Post-mix products
products.description: Fountain syrups dispensed through equipment mixing with water, sold to fountain retailers.

partnerships.description: Comprehensive beverage agreements granting exclusive rights to distribute, promote, market, sell, and manufacture Coca-Cola branded products in specified territories.
Party to CBA; Company makes quarterly acquisition-related sub-bottling payments to CCR for exclusive distribution rights.
Distribution agreement granting rights to distribute certain Monster Energy products.
Distribution and certain manufacturing agreements for Dr Pepper beverage brands and post-mix products.
Member of CONA; receives business process and IT services including the Coke One North America (CONA) system for DSD and manufacturing operations.
